attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who reacts to established gaps rather than initiating. Exploits GC team hesitation when time margins exceed 10+ minutes.
team_tactics: Functions as workhorse domestique in normal circumstances, given freedom to join secondary breakaway moves when GC squad shows reluctance to chase large time gaps.
terrain_preference: Unknown - insufficient data on specific terrain performance. Single observation shows breakaway endurance capability over extended distances.
vulnerability: Limited data suggests reliance on GC team tactical errors rather than raw attacking power. Requires permissive race situations to gain significant time.
key_patterns: Reacts to breaks after 12+ minute gaps established, not initial attacks (1 observation)
Exploits GC team chase reluctance when defending deep time deficits (1 observation)
Operates as domestique with opportunistic freedom for personal results (1 observation)
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows tactical awareness and endurance, but insufficient data to assess trajectory or consistency across race types
